noPluginsDesc: Plugins will appear here when they are installed.

modules.title: Module
modules.description: Built-in worker node functionality. Toggle modules to enable or disable backend features for this project.

integrations.title: Integration
integrations.description: External service plugins installed on the worker node. Configure credentials and settings for each integration.

views.title: View
views.description: UI-only features that add additional views and tools to the control plane interface.

settingsDialog.title: Plugin Settings
settingsDialog.description: Configure the plugin settings below. Required fields are marked with *.
settingsDialog.noSettings: This plugin has no configurable settings.

sbox-auth.name: S&box Auth
sbox-auth.description: S&box player authentication via Facepunch token validation.

telegram-bot.name: Telegram Bot
telegram-bot.description: Send notifications via Telegram Bot API.

discord-webhook.name: Discord Webhook
discord-webhook.description: Send messages to Discord via webhooks.

feature-kanban.name: Kanban View
feature-kanban.description: Kanban board view for data browser.

feature-websocket.name: WebSocket API
feature-websocket.description: Real-time WebSocket connections for live data updates.

descriptions.sbox-auth: Authenticate S&box players via Facepunch API. Validates player tokens on each request, maps Steam IDs to DataForge users, and supports session-based or token-based authentication flows for game servers.
descriptions.telegram-bot: Send notifications and alerts via Telegram Bot API. Configure webhook events to trigger messages to channels or groups. Supports rich text formatting, inline keyboards, and message templates.
descriptions.discord-webhook: Send real-time messages to Discord channels via webhooks. Supports embeds, mentions, and custom avatars. Trigger notifications on data changes, API events, or scheduled intervals.
descriptions.uptime-ping: Monitor service availability with periodic HTTP health checks. Sends configurable GET/POST requests to endpoints, tracks response times and status codes, and triggers alerts on failures.
descriptions.feature-api-playground: Interactive API testing environment with collections, request editor, and response viewer. Supports all HTTP methods and custom headers.
descriptions.feature-calendar: Calendar view for data browser — display records on a date grid. Visualize records as events, drag to reschedule.
descriptions.feature-db-map: Interactive 2D visualization of your database schema showing tables as nodes and foreign key relationships as connections.
descriptions.feature-gallery: Gallery view for data browser — display image thumbnails in a grid. Visual cards with thumbnails, titles, and descriptions.
descriptions.feature-kanban: Kanban board view for data browser — group records by status column. Drag and drop records between columns.
descriptions.feature-websocket: Real-time WebSocket connections for live data updates. Subscribe to table changes and receive events instantly.

feature-sdk.name: SDK
feature-sdk.description: Auto-generated client SDKs for TypeScript, Python, and cURL. Copy-paste ready code snippets for all API endpoints with authentication and type definitions included.

feature-cron.name: Cron Jobs
feature-cron.description: Schedule recurring SQL queries using cron expressions. Set up periodic data checks, cleanups, or reports. Includes execution history and error tracking.

feature-dashboards.name: Dashboards
feature-dashboards.description: Build custom data dashboards with drag-and-drop widgets. Supports charts, tables, counters, and custom SQL queries. Share dashboards with team members.

feature-graphql.name: GraphQL
feature-graphql.description: Auto-generated GraphQL API from your database schema. Includes queries, mutations, filtering, sorting, and pagination. Built-in GraphQL Playground with schema documentation.

feature-backups.name: Backups
feature-backups.description: Automated and manual database backups with configurable retention policies. Schedule backups via cron, download backup files, and restore from any point in time.

feature-analytics.name: Analytics
feature-analytics.description: Track API usage, response times, error rates, and popular endpoints. Visualize trends over time with interactive charts. Export analytics data for external analysis.

feature-query-builder.name: Query Builder
feature-query-builder.description: Visual SQL query builder with drag-and-drop interface. Build SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, and DELETE queries without writing SQL. Save queries and create API endpoints from them.

feature-websocket.name: WebSocket
feature-websocket.description: Real-time data streaming via WebSocket connections. Subscribe to table changes and receive INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE events instantly. Supports authentication and rate limiting.

feature-db-map.name: DB Map
feature-db-map.description: Interactive visual map of your database schema. View tables, columns, relationships, and foreign keys in a graph layout. Navigate complex schemas with ease.

feature-api-playground.name: API Playground
feature-api-playground.description: Interactive API testing environment. Send requests to your endpoints, inspect responses, and debug authentication. Supports all HTTP methods and custom headers.

feature-kanban.name: Kanban
feature-kanban.description: Kanban board view for any table with a status column. Drag and drop records between columns, filter by assignee, and track progress visually.

feature-calendar.name: Calendar
feature-calendar.description: Calendar view for tables with date/datetime columns. Visualize records as events, drag to reschedule, and filter by category or status.

feature-gallery.name: Gallery
feature-gallery.description: Gallery/card view for tables with image columns. Display records as visual cards with thumbnails, titles, and descriptions. Supports grid and list layouts.

feature-webhooks.name: Webhooks
feature-webhooks.description: Event-driven HTTP callbacks on data changes. Configure URLs, events (INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE), HMAC signing, and retry policies. View delivery logs and success rates.
